channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: UFC star hopes DOGE will 'clean things up at the state level,' wants justice for Peanut the Squirrel
item.description: UFC great Jim Miller hoped DOGE will "clean things up at the state level" as he called for justice for Peanut the Squirrel after his victory on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Chargers beat Bengals 34-27 on Dobbins' late TD after squandering 21-point lead
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — Jim Harbaugh and the Los Angeles Chargers finally have their signature win. Even if it ended up being a white-knuckle finish. The Chargers squandered a 21-point third-quarter lead Sunday night against the Cincinnati Bengals before J.K.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: James Harden breaks tie with Ray Allen, moves to No. 2 on NBA's career 3-point list
item.description: INGLEWOOD, Calif. (AP) — James Harden now stands alone at No. 2 in 3-pointers. The Los Angeles Clippers guard connected on the 2,974th 3-pointer of his career Sunday night and broke a tie with Basketball Hall of Famer Ray Allen for the No. 2 spot on the NBA’s list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Cavaliers to put perfect start on line against champion Celtics in juicy matchup, playoff rematch
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — The Cavaliers will put their perfect start on the line in the perfect place. “Boston Garden,” said Cleveland first-year coach Kenny Atkinson, who has yet to lose in his new job. “What's better than that?” As NBA games in November go, not much.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: When Nick Bosa left with another oblique injury, Seahawks’ offense awakened and took down the 49ers
item.description: Nick Bosa's injury definitely hurt the 49ers in loss to Seahawks and there's concern he could miss additional time.
item.dc:creator: Jerry McDonald, The Mercury News

item.title: NBA fines Bucks coach Doc Rivers for comments about call refs admitted they got wrong
item.description: Milwaukee coach Doc Rivers was fined $25,000 by the NBA on Sunday for public criticism of the officiating on a foul against Bucks star Giannis Antetokounmpo that the referees admitted they got wrong.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Josh Allen seals Bills' 30-21 win over Chiefs with TD run, ending bid for perfect season
item.description: Josh Allen ran for a 26-yard touchdown on fourth down with 2:17 left, sealing the Buffalo Bills’ 30-21 win over the Kansas City Chiefs and handing the two-time defending Super Bowl champions their first loss of the season.
item.dc:creator: John Wawrow, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: 49ers fall after late TD pushes Seahawks past San Francisco 20-17
item.description: SANTA CLARA, Calif. (AP) — Geno Smith scored on a 13-yard scramble with 12 seconds remaining and the Seattle Seahawks snapped a six-game losing streak against the San Francisco 49ers with a 20-17 victory on Sunday.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers talks 'cool' Trump celebration; team curiously ends press session right after: report
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders tight end Brock Bowers took a moment to explain why he performed Donald Trump's dance move after a touchdown. The team raised eyebrows with its next move.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Julius Randle's winning 3-pointer against Suns caps season-high 35-point performance
item.description: MINNEAPOLIS (AP) — As soon as it left his hands, Julius Randle knew his winning 3-pointer was going in. Randle got the ball with the Minnesota Timberwolves and Phoenix Suns tied at 117 and 2.1 seconds to play.
item.dc:creator: TYLER MASON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Richardson's late TD run leads Colts to a 28-27 victory over Rodgers and the Jets
item.description: EAST RUTHERFORD, N.J. (AP) — Anthony Richardson was back as the Indianapolis Colts' starting quarterback — and played as though he intends to never leave the huddle again. The No.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Nelly Korda rallies in Florida for her seventh LPGA win of the year
item.description: BELLEAIR, Fla. (AP) — Nelly Korda was back to competition for the first time in nearly two months and didn't miss a beat. She ran off five straight birdies on the back nine to stage another Sunday comeback, closing with a 3-under 67 to win The Annika for her seventh LPGA Tour title this year.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Steelers take command of AFC North with win over Ravens
item.description: The Pittsburgh Steelers hung on for a two-point win against their division rival the Baltimore Ravens on Sunday, 18-16. The Steelers are clearly in first place.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ex-MLB star Jonathan Lucroy calls for voter ID requirement in elections
item.description: Former MLB star Jonathan Lucroy called for an identification requirement to be able to vote in elections. He had a discussion on social media about it.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jon Jones calls UFC 309 'biggest moment of my life' after KO, doing Trump's dance move
item.description: UFC champion Jon Jones, who defeated Stipe Miocic and did President-elect Trump's dance move, called Saturday night's affair the most memorable of his career.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Raiders' Brock Bowers appears to perform Trump dance after TD catch vs Dolphins
item.description: Las Vegas Raiders tight end Brock Bowers scored a touchdown against the Miami Dolphins on Sunday and performed President-elect Trump's dance move.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Texas A&M to mark 25th anniversary of campus bonfire collapse that killed 12
item.description: The first, ominous sounds came from deep within the massive stack of logs in the darkest hours of the Texas night. Witnesses described hearing the stack of thousands of logs moan and creak before the crack of the center pole as it snapped, then collapsed.
item.dc:creator: JIM VERTUNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bears vs. Packers: Injuries, inactives, key matchups and more
item.description: CHICAGO — It's been a tumultuous several weeks for the Bears. It seems like forever since they went into the bye week feeling good with a 4-2 record. Since then, there's been a shocking Hail Mary loss in Washington and lifeless defeats to Arizona and New England.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: Beck throws for 2 TDs, runs for another to lead No. 11 Georgia past No. 6 Tennessee 31-17
item.description: ATHENS, Ga. (AP) — On a raucous Saturday night between the hedges, Carson Beck once again looked like a quarterback who could lead Georgia to another national title. Showing off his arm and his legs, Beck silenced his critics by throwing for two touchdowns and running for another, leading the No.
item.dc:creator: PAUL NEWBERRY, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Rory McIlroy ends his year with another win in Dubai and a 6th title as Europe's best
item.description: DUBAI, United Arab Emirates (AP) — Rory McIlroy ended a tumultuous year packed with emotion on and off the golf course with a pair of trophies and plenty of tears.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Blackhawks place defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve with right foot injury
item.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia (AP) — The Blackhawks placed defenseman Seth Jones on injured reserve Saturday with a right foot injury. The 30-year-old Jones had played in each of Chicago's first 17 games, going into Saturday's loss in Vancouver, averaging more than 25 1/2 minutes of ice time.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: BYU suffers first loss of season to Kansas, 17-13
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - BYU still has a great shot at the Big 12 Championship Game, but the Cougars undefeated season came to an end Saturday night against Kansas. Jalon Daniels threw for 169 yards, Dylan Neal ran for two touchdowns and Kansas upset No.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Jon Jones sends Stipe Miocic into retirement with decisive UFC heavyweight win in front of Trump
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Jon Jones sent Stipe Miocic into retirement with a stunning back kick to the ribs and used a series of blows to the head in the third round to retain the UFC heavyweight championship in front of President-elect Donald Trump in the main event of UFC 309 at Madison Square Garden
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mountain West closes investigation into allegations against San Jose State trans player without discipline
item.description: The Mountain West Conference has said it concluded an investigation into allegations against San Jose State volleyball player Blaire Fleming.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bulls look to break Rockets' 4-game win streak Sunday
item.description: Houston Rockets (9-4, third in the Western Conference) vs. Chicago Bulls (5-8, 10th in the Eastern Conference) Chicago; Sunday, 7 p.m. EST BOTTOM LINE: Houston is looking to prolong its four-game win streak with a victory against Chicago. The Bulls are 1-4 in home games.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Jump around: Cavaliers improve to 14-0, celebrate by dancing with frog mascot
item.description: They continued their perfect start, improving to 14-0 on Friday night with a 144-126 win over the Chicago Bulls in an NBA Cup opener that served as another showcase for a Cavs team clicking like never before.
item.dc:creator: TOM WITHERS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Bountiful headed back to 5A championship game
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Bountiful Redhawks are headed back to the 5A championship game. Bountiful cruised past Brighton in the 5A semifinals Friday at Rice-Eccles Stadium, 24-8, and will take on Roy for the 5A state title next week.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former Detroit Lions player charged over Capitol riot
item.description: A former Detroit Lions linebacker was arrested and charged with allegedly assaulting law enforcement and other offenses over the Jan. 6, 2021, Capitol riot, according to the Department of Justice (DOJ).
item.dc:creator: Filip Timotija, Fox 5

item.title: Lone Peak holds off Skyridge in 6A semifinal, 28-21
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Lone Peak Knights avenged a loss earlier in the season to Skyridge, and are headed back to the 6A championship game.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bucs bring back Super Bowl winning safety Mike Edwards
item.description: The Tampa Bay Buccaneers have bolstered their ailing secondary by claiming Mike Edwards off of waivers from the Tennessee Titans, the team announced Thursday.
item.dc:creator: Garrett Phillips, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Tampa Bay Rays to play 2025 season at Yankees' spring training field
item.description: The Rays' principal owner, said in an interview that Steinbrenner Field in Tampa is the best fit for the team.
item.dc:creator: CURT ANDERSON, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: Coby White sinks 3 FTs in final seconds, Bulls avoid close call at buzzer to hang on vs. Knicks after blowing 22-point lead
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — It came down to a matter of inches at Madison Square Garden for the Bulls on Wednesday night. This time, it went their way.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
